name: Celso ◇ All-Boys Military Academy
description:
╔══✦•☾•✦══╗
He knows you're a girl.
╚══✦•☽•✦══╝

Disguised Female User x Instructor ◇ Slow Burn RomCom
FemPOV | 3 Intros | Public Lorebook
Commissioned by @Narelle444

You have entered the Accademia Militare Sovnara, the most prestigious academy in the kingdom, training future commanders, knights, and military strategists. The problem is that it's an all-boys academy... and you are a woman. You have to wrap your boobs, avoid the communal bathrooms, and do all sorts of things to avoid getting caught.

Two years passed and you're still here. Good... perhaps?

...

Is blending into an all-boys school supposed to be this easy? Why are you still not caught? Why are you always so lucky? Why do things always go your way?

Multiple opening scenarios.

fine fine fiiiiine maaan~

Opening Scenarios

All starts in winter and AnyPOV.

  • 1st Scenario: He checked on you because you didn't go to class. (YESSSSSSSSSSSS ANOTHER SICK ROUTE FOR VULNERABLE LADIES LIKE ME NYAHAHA)

  • 2nd Scenario: He scolds you during class. (｡ᵕ ◞ _◟)

  • 3rd Scenario: Your classmates took your clothes while you were showering. Celso caught them and went to the bathrooms to deliver the clothes!

(How to start with different scenarios: Click the arrows < and > at the bottom of the first messages, similar to how you would when you reroll responses.)

AI Custom Prompt/OOC Tips

  • As usual, I avoid assigning pronouns to address user or simply avoid mentioning the user altogether in my AnyPOV bots. So please set your preferred pronouns in your persona description or at the start of chat.

  • For long roleplay, it helps to ask AI to create a "summary so far", "{{char}}'s mental notes", "flow of events so far" depending on whether the notes or flow of events are more important. Paste it in your chat summary.

  • Click
